en: "Now these are the rules that you shall set before them.
zh: “你要在眾民面前訂立的典章是這樣的。

en: When you buy a Hebrew slave, he shall serve six years, and in the seventh he shall go out free, for nothing.
zh: 如果你買希伯來人作奴僕，他要服事你六年；到第七年他可以自由出去，不必補償甚麼。

en: If he comes in single, he shall go out single; if he comes in married, then his wife shall go out with him.
zh: 他若是單身來，就可以單身出去；他若是有婦之夫，他的妻子就可以和他同去。

en: If his master gives him a wife and she bears him sons or daughters, the wife and her children shall be her master's, and he shall go out alone.
zh: 他的主人若是給他妻子，妻子又給他生了兒女，那麼妻子和兒女都要歸給主人，他自己要單獨出去。

en: But if the slave plainly says, 'I love my master, my wife, and my children; I will not go out free,'
zh: 如果那奴僕明明說：‘我愛我的主人和我的妻子兒女，不願意自由出去。’

en: then his master shall bring him to God, and he shall bring him to the door or the doorpost. And his master shall bore his ear through with an awl, and he shall be his slave forever.
zh: 他的主人就要把他帶到審判官 那裡，又要把他帶到門前，或是門柱旁；他的主人要用錐子刺穿他的耳朵，他就要永遠服事他的主人。

en: "When a man sells his daughter as a slave, she shall not go out as the male slaves do.
zh: 如果有人把女兒賣作婢女，婢女不可像男僕那樣出去。

en: If she does not please her master, who has designated her for himself, then he shall let her be redeemed. He shall have no right to sell her to a foreign people, since he has broken faith with her.
zh: 如果主人選定她歸自己，以後又不喜歡她，就要准她贖身；主人沒有權力可以把她賣給外族人，因為主人曾經欺騙了她。

en: If he designates her for his son, he shall deal with her as with a daughter.
zh: 如果主人選定她歸自己的兒子，就必須照著待女兒的規矩待她。

en: If he takes another wife to himself, he shall not diminish her food, her clothing, or her marital rights.
zh: 如果他另娶一個妻子，那麼，對她的飲食、衣著和性的需要，仍然不可減少。

en: And if he does not do these three things for her, she shall go out for nothing, without payment of money.
zh: 如果他不向她行這三樣，她就可以自由出去，不必補償甚麼。

en: "Whoever strikes a man so that he dies shall be put to death.
zh: “打人以致把人打死的，必要把那人處死。

en: But if he did not lie in wait for him, but God let him fall into his hand, then I will appoint for you a place to which he may flee.
zh: 人若不是蓄意殺人，而是 神交在他手中的，我就給你設立一個地方，他可以逃到那裡去。

en: But if a man willfully attacks another to kill him by cunning, you shall take him from my altar, that he may die.
zh: 若有人任意待他的鄰舍，用詭計把他殺了，你要把他從我的祭壇那裡拿去處死。

en: "Whoever strikes his father or his mother shall be put to death.
zh: “打父母的，必要把那人處死。

en: "Whoever steals a man and sells him, and anyone found in possession of him, shall be put to death.
zh: “拐帶人口的，無論是把人賣了，或是還留在他手中，必要把那人處死。

en: "Whoever curses his father or his mother shall be put to death.
zh: 咒罵父母的，必要把那人處死。

en: "When men quarrel and one strikes the other with a stone or with his fist and the man does not die but takes to his bed,
zh: “如果人彼此爭論，一個用石頭或拳頭打另一個，但他還沒有死，不過要躺在床上，

en: then if the man rises again and walks outdoors with his staff, he who struck him shall be clear; only he shall pay for the loss of his time, and shall have him thoroughly healed.
zh: 以後，他若是能起來，能扶杖出外行走，那打他的就可算無罪，但要賠償他停工的損失，並且要把他完全醫好。

en: "When a man strikes his slave, male or female, with a rod and the slave dies under his hand, he shall be avenged.
zh: “如果有人用棍打他的奴僕或婢女，以致死在他的手下，他必須受刑罰；

en: But if the slave survives a day or two, he is not to be avenged, for the slave is his money.
zh: 但如果他還活一兩天，那人就不必受刑罰，因為那奴僕是他的財產。

en: "When men strive together and hit a pregnant woman, so that her children come out, but there is no harm, the one who hit her shall surely be fined, as the woman's husband shall impose on him, and he shall pay as the judges determine.
zh: “如果人彼此爭鬥，擊傷了懷孕的婦人，以致流產，但沒有別的損害，那傷害她的必須按照婦人的丈夫要求的，和照著審判官斷定的，繳納罰款。

en: But if there is harm, then you shall pay life for life,
zh: 如果有別的損害，你就要以命償命，

en: eye for eye, tooth for tooth, hand for hand, foot for foot,
zh: 以眼還眼，以牙還牙，以手還手，以腳還腳，

en: burn for burn, wound for wound, stripe for stripe.
zh: 以烙還烙，以傷還傷，以打還打。

en: "When a man strikes the eye of his slave, male or female, and destroys it, he shall let the slave go free because of his eye.
zh: “如果有人擊打他奴僕的一隻眼，或婢女的一隻眼，把眼打壞了，就要因他的眼的緣故讓他自由離去。

en: If he knocks out the tooth of his slave, male or female, he shall let the slave go free because of his tooth.
zh: 如果有人打落了他奴僕的一顆牙，或婢女的一顆牙，就要因他的牙的緣故讓他自由離去。

en: "When an ox gores a man or a woman to death, the ox shall be stoned, and its flesh shall not be eaten, but the owner of the ox shall not be liable.
zh: “如果牛觸了男人或女人，以致死亡，那牛必須用石頭打死，只是不可吃牛的肉；牛的主人卻不必受刑罰。

en: But if the ox has been accustomed to gore in the past, and its owner has been warned but has not kept it in, and it kills a man or a woman, the ox shall be stoned, and its owner also shall be put to death.
zh: 如果那牛以前常常觸人，牛主也曾經受過警告，他仍然不把牛拴好，以致觸死了男人或是女人，就要用石頭把那牛打死，牛主也必要處死。

en: If a ransom is imposed on him, then he shall give for the redemption of his life whatever is imposed on him.
zh: 如果給他提出贖金，他就必須照著提出的數量全數繳付贖命金。

en: If it gores a man's son or daughter, he shall be dealt with according to this same rule.
zh: 牛無論觸了人的兒子，或是觸了人的女兒，都必須照著這定例辦理。

en: If the ox gores a slave, male or female, the owner shall give to their master thirty shekels of silver, and the ox shall be stoned.
zh: 如果牛觸了人的奴僕，或是婢女，必須把三百四十克銀子給他的主人，那牛也必須用石頭打死。

en: "When a man opens a pit, or when a man digs a pit and does not cover it, and an ox or a donkey falls into it,
zh: “如果有人把井敞開，或是有人挖了井，而不把井口遮蓋，以致有牛或驢掉進裡面，

en: the owner of the pit shall make restoration. He shall give money to its owner, and the dead beast shall be his.
zh: 井主要賠償，要把銀子還給牛主或驢主，死的牲畜可以歸自己。

en: "When one man's ox butts another's, so that it dies, then they shall sell the live ox and share its price, and the dead beast also they shall share.
zh: “如果有人的牛傷了他鄰舍的牛，以致死亡，他們要把活牛賣了，平分銀子，也要平分死牛。

en: Or if it is known that the ox has been accustomed to gore in the past, and its owner has not kept it in, he shall repay ox for ox, and the dead beast shall be his.
zh: 如果人知道那牛以前常常觸人，牛主竟不把牛拴好，他必須賠償，以牛還牛，死的可以歸自己。”
